clusters.title: Iran plans dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei after war death
clusters.neutral_headline: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
bullet_summary: Reported by NPR News, BBC World, Al Jazeera and others

items.title: Iran plans dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei after war death
items.standfirst: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989.
items.content: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989.(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)

items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.standfirst: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.content: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

items.title: Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies for slain Supreme Leader Khamenei
items.standfirst: Top Iranian officials and foreign dignitaries pay respects to late leader killed in joint US-Israeli strike in February.
items.content: Top Iranian officials and foreign dignitaries pay respects to late leader killed in joint US-Israeli strike in February.

items.title: Peace talks paused as Iran gears up for dayslong funeral for slain supreme leader
items.standfirst: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was put on display in Tehran Friday with millions expected to attend his dayslong funeral.
items.content: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was put on display in Tehran Friday with millions expected to attend his dayslong funeral.

items.title: Iran mourns slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
items.standfirst: Iranians are holding a two-day mourning period for slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed by strikes when the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran sparked. Retired Navy Vice Adm. Robert Murrett weighs in.
items.content: Iranians are holding a two-day mourning period for slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed by strikes when the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran sparked. Retired Navy Vice Adm. Robert Murrett weighs in.

items.title: Iran begins mourning for Khamenei under tight security
items.standfirst: Dignitaries from more than 100 nations pay respects to slain supreme leader ahead of official funeral
items.content: Dignitaries from more than 100 nations pay respects to slain supreme leader ahead of official funeral

items.title: Iran gets ready for Khamenei's funeral
items.standfirst: He was assassinated in a #US-Israeli strike in February 2026. #Iran's Supreme leader Ali #Khamenei's #funerals are set to be held on July 4, with authorities expecting between 15 and 20 million people to attend.
items.content: He was assassinated in a #US-Israeli strike in February 2026. #Iran's Supreme leader Ali #Khamenei's #funerals are set to be held on July 4, with authorities expecting between 15 and 20 million people to attend.

items.title: Millions expected to attend as Iran begins dayslong Khamenei funeral
items.standfirst: The body of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei lay in state in a vast hall in Tehran on Friday as clerics, officials, foreign dignitaries and other mourners paid their respects to Iran's late Supreme Leader, slain by U.S. and Israeli bombs. Iran is staging a week of mass funeral processions for Khamenei, with millions of mourners expected to attend.
items.content: The body of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei lay in state in a vast hall in Tehran on Friday as clerics, officials, foreign dignitaries and other mourners paid their respects to Iran's late Supreme Leader, slain by U.S. and Israeli bombs. Iran is staging a week of mass funeral processions for Khamenei, with millions of mourners expected to attend.

items.title: Iranian leaders, foreign officials pay respects to Khamenei ahead of grand funeral
items.standfirst: Iranian officials and international dignitaries paid their respects to Iran's former leader Ali Khamenei on Friday as he lay in state in Tehran. Meanwhile mourners gathered outside the vast Grand Mosalla religious complex where his casket is on display, ahead of its opening to the public on Saturday morning.
items.content: Iranian officials and international dignitaries paid their respects to Iran's former leader Ali Khamenei on Friday as he lay in state in Tehran. Meanwhile mourners gathered outside the vast Grand Mosalla religious complex where his casket is on display, ahead of its opening to the public on Saturday morning.

items.title: Iran’s injured Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei won’t attend his father’s funeral, sources say
items.standfirst: TEHRAN, Iran — Iran’s Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is not expected to attend his own father’s funeral, an Iranian official and a Middle Eastern diplomat tell NBC News.
items.content: TEHRAN, Iran — Iran’s Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is not expected to attend his own father’s funeral, an Iranian official and a Middle Eastern diplomat tell NBC News.

clusters.title: Ukrainian woman identified as main suspect in Monaco bombing
clusters.neutral_headline: Ukrainian woman identified as main suspect in Monaco bombing
bullet_summary: Interpol has named a woman who is wanted over a bombing in Monaco which reportedly targeted a Ukrainian tycoon with links to Russia
Reported by Al Jazeera, France24, Guardian World and others

items.title: Ukrainian woman identified as main suspect in Monaco bombing
items.standfirst: Interpol has identified 39-year-old Anastasiia Berezovska as the main suspect in Monday’s bombing in Monaco.
items.content: Interpol has identified 39-year-old Anastasiia Berezovska as the main suspect in Monday’s bombing in Monaco.

items.title: Police hunt for Ukrainian woman over Monaco bomb attack
items.standfirst: Authorities Friday were looking for a Ukrainian woman with a tattoo suspected of planting a bomb in Monaco that injured three people including a Ukrainian-born tycoon, after German police raided her flat. Identified as Anastasiia Berezovska, 39, the suspect is wanted in Monaco for attempted murder, placing an explosive device on a public road with criminal intent, and criminal conspiracy over the explosion on Monday, according to an Interpol Red Notice.
items.content: Authorities Friday were looking for a Ukrainian woman with a tattoo suspected of planting a bomb in Monaco that injured three people including a Ukrainian-born tycoon, after German police raided her flat. Identified as Anastasiia Berezovska, 39, the suspect is wanted in Monaco for attempted murder, placing an explosive device on a public road with criminal intent, and criminal conspiracy over the explosion on Monday, according to an Interpol Red Notice.

items.title: Interpol names Ukrainian woman as suspect in Monaco bombing
items.standfirst: Anastasiia Berezovska is named as the chief suspect responsible for injuring Ukrainian tycoon Vadym Yermolaiev.
items.content: Anastasiia Berezovska is named as the chief suspect responsible for injuring Ukrainian tycoon Vadym Yermolaiev.

items.title: Ukrainian woman suspected of Monaco parcel bombing was ‘disguised as a man’
items.standfirst: Suspect seen in Germany after attack apparently targeting tycoon Vadym IermolaievThe main suspect in a Monaco bomb attack this week that seriously injured a Ukraine-born business tycoon and two of his family members is a Ukrainian woman living in Germany who disguised herself as a man, authorities have said.Interpol, the international police organisation, on Friday issued a red notice for Anastasiia Berezovska, aged 39, describing her as German-speaking with dark hair and a tattoo, possibly of a snake, on her right arm from the shoulder to the elbow. Continue reading...
items.content: Suspect seen in Germany after attack apparently targeting tycoon Vadym IermolaievThe main suspect in a Monaco bomb attack this week that seriously injured a Ukraine-born business tycoon and two of his family members is a Ukrainian woman living in Germany who disguised herself as a man, authorities have said.Interpol, the international police organisation, on Friday issued a red notice for Anastasiia Berezovska, aged 39, describing her as German-speaking with dark hair and a tattoo, possibly of a snake, on her right arm from the shoulder to the elbow. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Romanians sentenced in London for Iran-directed attack on journalist
clusters.neutral_headline: Two Romanians jailed over stabbing of Iranian TV journalist in London
bullet_summary: The two men were found to have stabbed opposition-supporting Pouria Zeraati on a Wimbledon street
Reported by Financial Times, Guardian World, BBC Top Stories

items.title: Romanians sentenced in London for Iran-directed attack on journalist
items.standfirst: The two men were found to have stabbed opposition-supporting Pouria Zeraati on a Wimbledon street
items.content: The two men were found to have stabbed opposition-supporting Pouria Zeraati on a Wimbledon street

items.title: Two Romanians jailed over stabbing of Iranian TV journalist in London
items.standfirst: Judge says evidence indicates attack on Pouria Zeraati outside home was carried out on behalf of Tehran regimeTwo Romanians who took part in a “targeted” knife attack on a television journalist in London “on behalf of the Iranian state” have been jailed.Pouria Zeraati, who worked for the Persian-language channel Iran International, which is critical of the Tehran regime, was left bleeding in the street after being stabbed three times outside his home in Wimbledon. Continue reading...
items.content: Judge says evidence indicates attack on Pouria Zeraati outside home was carried out on behalf of Tehran regimeTwo Romanians who took part in a “targeted” knife attack on a television journalist in London “on behalf of the Iranian state” have been jailed.Pouria Zeraati, who worked for the Persian-language channel Iran International, which is critical of the Tehran regime, was left bleeding in the street after being stabbed three times outside his home in Wimbledon. Continue reading...

items.title: Two Romanians jailed for stabbing journalist on behalf of Iran regime
items.standfirst: The two men will face 12 and eight years in prison for the knife attack in Wimbledon, London in 2024.
items.content: The two men will face 12 and eight years in prison for the knife attack in Wimbledon, London in 2024.

Reported by Al Jazeera, France24, BBC World

items.title: Hottest June on record in France as heatwave deaths rise to alarming levels
items.standfirst: The average temperatures on June 24 and 25 this year were the highest ever recorded in the country.
items.content: The average temperatures on June 24 and 25 this year were the highest ever recorded in the country.

items.title: France saw 2,025 excess deaths in June heatwave
items.standfirst: There were at least 2,025 more deaths than expected in France during June's heatwave, the country's health minister said on Friday. France last month recorded its hottest June since records began in 1947 with a temperatures spiking above 40C in many areas.
items.content: There were at least 2,025 more deaths than expected in France during June's heatwave, the country's health minister said on Friday. France last month recorded its hottest June since records began in 1947 with a temperatures spiking above 40C in many areas.

items.content: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.

items.title: REPLAY: Mamdani gives speech as US marks 250th birthday
items.standfirst: New York mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered a speech on Friday to mark America’s 250th birthday, just hours before Donald Trump is set to deliver an address at Mount Rushmore to commemorate the anniversary. Watch Mamdani's speech above.
items.content: New York mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered a speech on Friday to mark America’s 250th birthday, just hours before Donald Trump is set to deliver an address at Mount Rushmore to commemorate the anniversary. Watch Mamdani's speech above.

items.title: As America turns 250, Mamdani leads Trump opposition
items.standfirst: As the US prepares to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the birth of the country - an event many feel has been hijacked by Donald Trump - France 24's Kethevane Gorjestani takes a look at how New York mayor Zohran Mamdani as become the face of opposition to Trump's vision of what it means to celebrate America.
items.content: As the US prepares to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the birth of the country - an event many feel has been hijacked by Donald Trump - France 24's Kethevane Gorjestani takes a look at how New York mayor Zohran Mamdani as become the face of opposition to Trump's vision of what it means to celebrate America.
